name: excalidraw-diagram-skill
description: Agent skill for creating, rendering, and validating Excalidraw architecture and workflow diagrams in Codex, Claude Code, and Gemini CLI.

scripts.test: npm run build && node ./bin/excalidraw-diagram-skill.js --help && node ./bin/excalidraw-diagram-skill.js install --ai codex --dry-run && node ./bin/excalidraw-diagram-skill.js install --ai claude --dry-run && node ./bin/excalidraw-diagram-skill.js install --ai gemini --dry-run && node ./bin/excalidraw-diagram-skill.js install --ai all --dry-run
